text:
- Consider consolidating the existing self-management grammar:

```text
tenex-edge my session
tenex-edge my session title --topic "..."
tenex-edge my session end
tenex-edge my session kill
tenex-edge my session pty-wrap
```

That removes redundant `--self`, the foreign target accepted by `my session end`, and `pty-wrap-me`’s redundant suffix. [...] User: let's do tenex-edge my session status <title> instead

show me the full list of commands that tenex-edge would have as an expanded deep-tree

like:

tenex-edge my
             > session
                       > status -- changes the status of the agent
